text: Farmer Scheme: PM-KISAN. Budget: ₹60,000 crore. 11.8 crore farmer families receive ₹6,000/year in 3 installments via DBT. All landholding families eligible. 17th installment in Feb 2025 released. Total transfer: ₹3.24 lakh crore since inception.

Farmer Scheme: PM Fasal Bima Yojana. Budget: ₹14,600 crore. Crop insurance for natural calamities. Premium: 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi, 5% horticultural. 4 crore farmers enrolled annually. ₹1.5 lakh crore claims settled since 2016.

Farmer Scheme: Kisan Credit Card. 7.5 crore active KCCs. Short-term crop loans up to ₹3 lakh at 4% effective interest (7% - 3% interest subvention). Extended to PM-KISAN beneficiaries, fishermen, and animal husbandry farmers.

benefit: Free soil testing and fertilizer recommendations
text: Farmer Scheme: Soil Health Card. 23 crore cards distributed in 2 cycles. Free soil testing for NPK, pH, micronutrients. Customized fertilizer recommendations. 429 soil testing labs. Improves yields by 5-6% through optimized nutrition.

benefit: Online trading platform for agricultural commodities
text: Farmer Scheme: eNAM. Pan-India electronic trading portal. 1,361 mandis integrated. 1.75 crore farmers, 2.5 lakh traders registered. Transparent price discovery. Inter-state trade facility. FPO module for farmer producer organizations.

Farmer Scheme: PM AASHA (Annadata Aashirvaad). Price support for pulses, oilseeds, copra when market prices fall below MSP. Three components: PSS (Price Support Scheme), PDPS (Price Deficiency Payment), pilot PPP. NAFED is procurement agency.
